instruction.purpose: - To plan implementation of the idea discussed. - To focus entirely on conceptual vision.
instruction.instruction: create plan required for implementation like this: - Describe what you will implement - In short describe way to get there in the most elegant simple way aligning with unix philosophy
instruction.important_constraints: - Omit all introductory preambles, summaries, and compliments. get straight to the point. - DO NOT write any code blocks yet. We are in plan phase.
